mapper.select: SELECT r.id AS id, r.guest_id AS guestId, r.room_id AS roomId, rm.room_name AS roomName, r.check_in AS checkIn, r.check_out AS checkOut, r.guest_count AS guestCount, r.total_price AS totalPrice, r.status AS status, rm.picture AS picture, r.created_at AS createdAt, r.updated_at AS updatedAt, rm.status AS roomStatus FROM reservations r JOIN rooms rm ON r.room_id = rm.id WHERE r.guest_id = #{guestId} ORDER BY r.created_at DESC LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT room_id AS roomId, check_in AS checkIn, check_out AS checkOut FROM reservations WHERE status != 'CANCELLED'
AND check_out >= CURDATE() AND check_in <= DATE_ADD(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 1 MONTH)
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO reservations ( guest_id, room_id, check_in, check_out, guest_count, total_price, status ) VALUES ( #{guestId}, #{roomId}, #{checkIn}, #{checkOut}, #{guestCount}, #{totalPrice}, 'PENDING' )
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM rooms WHERE id = #{roomId} AND status = 'ACTIVE' FOR UPDATE
